title: rosa rugosa f. alba
intro: Rosa rugosa f. alba, also known as the white rugosa rose, is a variety of rose that is native to East Asia and is known for its fragrant white flowers and thick, grayish-green foliage. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rosa rugosa f. alba include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and support the immune system. Rosa rugosa f. alba can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in skincare products due to its antibacterial and anti-aging properties.
